title: Drop Paint Masker Tape & Drape Masking Film Plastic Dust Sheeting Roll Waterproof Self Adhesive Painting Drop Film Pre-Taped Masking Film for Painting, Decorating, Furniture Covering | 270cm X 20 m
features: Product Dimension: Our heavy duty polythene sheeting roll has generous dimensions of 270cm x 20 m providing ample coverage, making it suitable for various surfaces, including walls, doors, floors, and even automobiles

Superior Surface Protection: The masking tape along one side of the plastic sheeting securely binds to surfaces, ensuring complete coverage and shielding against paint spills, drips, and dust particles

Time-Saving Solution: Our plastic sheet roll can save valuable time on surface preparation, as it eliminates the need for taping or masking multiple surfaces individually to achieve a professional quality result

Versatility: Besides paint projects, our drop paint masker is also ideal for shielding surfaces from dust during renovations, construction work, or other activities where surface protection is necessary

How to use: Our paint shield is user-friendly just make sure the surface is dust-free, dry, and clean; Before using, always do a test on a discrete area; Use of this product is not advised on freshly painted or fragile surfaces
